custom.@vueuse/sound: Vue composable for playing sounds using Howler.js
custom.vue-boring-avatars: SVG-based avatars from any username and color palette

unused.snd-lib: Sexy UI sounds. Audio sprite from https://snd.dev/ is used in this project
unused.ultimate-ui-sfx-pack: Free UI SFX pack from https://jdsherbert.itch.io/ultimate-ui-sfx-pack. Named Whoosh in the app
